18.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

18.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)

18.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)

18.gl: a horn (as projecting); by implication, a flask, cornet; by resemblance. an elephant's tooth (i.e. ivory), a corner (of the altar), a peak (of a mountain), a ray (of light); figuratively, power
